productDisplayName: Fila Men Dls 96 White Sports Shoes
description: Win those winning baskets in style with these fila DLS 96 Basketball shoes. With a simple-yet-stylish design, enriched with DLS foam cushioning and a grippy outsole, it’s designed to bring out the winner in you.UpperSynthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute durability, breathable comfort and styleHigh ankle collar for better support to the lower legLace-up system for a snug, customized FitMeshed and padded tongue and collar for snug and fresh all-day comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionDynamic Landing System (DLS) for better impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with modified herringbone grooves throughout for absolute grip even on smooth courtsshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
